zh.Of, Tamworth, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾塔沃斯

zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliane de Vassi於1180年出生在英國斯塔福爾塔沃斯時，她的父親Philippe II de Vassy26歲，母親Mathilde Mabille de HARCOUET13歲。她與Robert Marmion在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾塔沃斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.Arrow, Warwickshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾阿洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliane de Vassi于1180年出生在英国斯塔福爾塔沃斯时，她的父亲Philippe II de Vassy26岁，母亲Mathilde Mabille de HARCOUET13岁。她与Robert Marmion在英国英格兰斯塔福爾塔沃斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vassi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian (Gujarat): name based on a military or administrative title given by Saurashtra rulers in ancient India.

nameMeanings.name: Juliane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

variants.name: Julieann
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliane de Vassi was born in 1180, in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, her father, Philippe II de Vassy, was 26 and her mother, Mathilde Mabille de HARCOUET, was 13. She married Robert Marmion in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliane de Vassi est née en 1180, à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Philippe II de Vassy, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mathilde Mabille de HARCOUET, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Marmion à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliane de Vassi 1180 in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philippe II de Vassy 26 und ihre Mutter Mathilde Mabille de HARCOUET 13. Sie hat in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Marmion geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliane de Vassi è nata il nel 1180 nel Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Philippe II de Vassy, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mathilde Mabille de HARCOUET, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Robert Marmion nel Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliane de Vassiが1180年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスで生まれた時，父Philippe II de Vassyは26歳，母Mathilde Mabille de HARCOUETは13歳であった。イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスでRobert Marmionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliane de Vassi(이)가 1180년 영국 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philippe II de Vassy(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde Mabille de HARCOUET(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 Robert Marmion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliane de Vassi nasceu em 1180, em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philippe II de Vassy, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde Mabille de HARCOUET, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Marmion em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliane de Vassi родилась в 1180 г. в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Philippe II de Vassy было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde Mabille de HARCOUET, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Marmion в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliane de Vassi nació en 1180, en Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Philippe II de Vassy, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mathilde Mabille de HARCOUET, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Robert Marmion en Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
